title: Pink Petal Carpet
body:
This mod changes Pink Petal blocks to function near-identically to carpets:

*   Pink Petal blocks are no longer a "4-in-1" block, and only one Pink Petal block can be in one tile
*   They have had their model and texture changed to Cherry Leaves
*   They can now be placed on anything (including water!) and will stay as long as there is a block under them
* Overrides vanilla worldgen (flower_cherry) to account for the above adjustments
*   However, _unlike_ carpets, they do not have collision

_This mod was created as a commission._
